query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "enhancing train-free infinite-frame generation for consistent long vid" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it addresses the exact same mechanism (training-free extension of video diffusion models to long frames) and domain (long video generation with temporal consistency) as the user's question, offering a specific spectral-reconstruction approach to the "infinite-frame" problem referenced in the user's follow-up.
